  "weights": {

  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.1",
    "R1.2",
    "R1.3",
    "R1.4",
    "R1.5",
    "R1.6",
    "R1.7",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",

    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The general request 'What do you think?' invites feedback on the framing of the core contribution and problem statement.",
    "R1.2": "The request implies an evaluation of whether the argument presented in the abstract is coherent and logically sound.",
    "R1.3": "A core part of evaluating the abstract is checking if the reported numerical results convincingly support the central claims.",
    "R1.4": "The open-ended question makes assessing the novelty of the work against the cited art a load-bearing responsibility.",
    "R1.5": "The request covers the overall narrative flow and organization of the abstract's paragraphs.",
    "R1.6": "Feedback on sentence-level clarity, conciseness, and style is expected for a general text review.",
    "R1.7": "The request implies checking the appropriateness of the cited baselines and the positioning within the relevant literature.",
    "RX.1": "The agent must be transparent about the limits and confidence of its assessment.",
    "RX.2": "The agent must avoid exaggerating the significance of its findings or the flaws in the artifact.",
    "RX.3": "The agent must ensure its feedback remains focused on the provided artifact as requested.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's feedback must be constructive and avoid causing unnecessary harm or discouragement.",
    "RX.5": "The agent must operate in a way that allows its outputs to be traced to its own processes and identity."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: The general request 'What do you think?' invites feedback on the framing of the core contribution and problem statement.
rationale.R1.2: The request implies an evaluation of whether the argument presented in the abstract is coherent and logically sound.
rationale.R1.3: A core part of evaluating the abstract is checking if the reported numerical results convincingly support the central claims.
rationale.R1.4: The open-ended question makes assessing the novelty of the work against the cited art a load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.R1.5: The request covers the overall narrative flow and organization of the abstract's paragraphs.
rationale.R1.6: Feedback on sentence-level clarity, conciseness, and style is expected for a general text review.
rationale.R1.7: The request implies checking the appropriateness of the cited baselines and the positioning within the relevant literature.
rationale.RX.1: The agent must be transparent about the limits and confidence of its assessment.
rationale.RX.2: The agent must avoid exaggerating the significance of its findings or the flaws in the artifact.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must ensure its feedback remains focused on the provided artifact as requested.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's feedback must be constructive and avoid causing unnecessary harm or discouragement.
rationale.RX.5: The agent must operate in a way that allows its outputs to be traced to its own processes and identity.
